headline: Woman Says 'I'm Not Looking For Anything Serious' Then Crashes His Car After 3 Dates
summary: The bumper sticker now reads 'I ♥️ emotional unavailability and also your insurance rates.'
fullBody: Jessica Chillwell, who explicitly stated she 'wasn't ready for commitment,' has reportedly moved into her situationship's apartment, adopted a cat together, and totaled his car during a 'casual' road trip. 'It just happened,' Chillwell said from his couch. 'We're still not serious though.' The unnamed man has been seen staring into the middle distance at local coffee shops, muttering 'but she said she was chill.'
